{'sql': "SELECT DISTINCT s.StuID
FROM Student s
WHERE s.StuID NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT hp.StuID
    FROM Has_Pet hp
    JOIN Pets p ON hp.PetID = p.PetID
    WHERE LOWER(p.PetType) = 'cat'
);"}

SELECT DISTINCT s.StuID
FROM Student s
WHERE s.StuID NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT hp.StuID
    FROM Has_Pet hp
    JOIN Pets p ON hp.PetID = p.PetID
    WHERE LOWER(p.PetType) = 'cat'
);
